'''鈭歯g-f-p''' ('''ngafapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preace|preace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preace|preace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-f-p
|-
! Lemma
| ngafapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafapithi|ngafapithi]] || [[word:ngafapiji|ngafapiji]] || [[word:ngafapishi|ngafapishi]] || [[word:ngafapi|ngafapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafaputhuth|ngafaputhuth]] || [[word:ngafapujuj|ngafapujuj]] || [[word:ngafapushush|ngafapushush]] || [[word:ngafap|ngafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafaputhu|ngafaputhu]] || [[word:ngafapuju|ngafapuju]] || [[word:ngafapushu|ngafapushu]] || [[word:ngafapu|ngafapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafapufuth|ngafapufuth]] || [[word:ngafapufuj|ngafapufuj]] || [[word:ngafapufush|ngafapufush]] || [[word:ngafapuf|ngafapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafapethe|ngafapethe]] || [[word:ngafapeje|ngafapeje]] || [[word:ngafapeshe|ngafapeshe]] || [[word:ngafape|ngafape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafapothoth|ngafapothoth]] || [[word:ngafapojoj|ngafapojoj]] || [[word:ngafaposhosh|ngafaposhosh]] || [[word:ngafap|ngafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafapotho|ngafapotho]] || [[word:ngafapojo|ngafapojo]] || [[word:ngafaposho|ngafaposho]] || [[word:ngafapo|ngafapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafapofoth|ngafapofoth]] || [[word:ngafapofoj|ngafapofoj]] || [[word:ngafapofosh|ngafapofosh]] || [[word:ngafapof|ngafapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafap忙th忙|ngafap忙th忙]] || [[word:ngafap忙j忙|ngafap忙j忙]] || [[word:ngafap忙sh忙|ngafap忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngafap忙|ngafap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafapathath|ngafapathath]] || [[word:ngafapajaj|ngafapajaj]] || [[word:ngafapashash|ngafapashash]] || [[word:ngafap|ngafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafapatha|ngafapatha]] || [[word:ngafapaja|ngafapaja]] || [[word:ngafapasha|ngafapasha]] || [[word:ngafapa|ngafapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafapafath|ngafapafath]] || [[word:ngafapafaj|ngafapafaj]] || [[word:ngafapafash|ngafapafash]] || [[word:ngafapaf|ngafapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngafapasha|ngafapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongafapasha|gongafapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingafapasha|gokingafapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafapn眉sha|ngafapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongafapnkn眉sha|gongafapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingafapn眉sha|gokingafapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafapsh毛sha|ngafapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafapnksh毛sha|gongafapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafapsh毛sha|gokingafapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafaprosha|ngafaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafapnkrosha|gongafapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafaprosha|gokingafaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafapmusha|ngafapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafapnkmusha|gongafapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafapmusha|gokingafapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngafapsherasha|ngafapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongafapnksherasha|gongafapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingafapsherasha|gokingafapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngafapngasha|ngafapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongafapnkngasha|gongafapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingafapngasha|gokingafapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngafapyasha|ngafapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongafapnkyasha|gongafapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingafapyasha|gokingafapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngafapyamasha|ngafapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongafapnkyamasha|gongafapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingafapyamasha|gokingafapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafapn眉sh毛sha|ngafapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafapnkn眉sh毛sha|gongafapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafapn眉sh毛sha|gokingafapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafapn眉rosha|ngafapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafapnkn眉rosha|gongafapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafapn眉rosha|gokingafapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafapn眉musha|ngafapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafapnkn眉musha|gongafapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafapn眉musha|gokingafapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafapsh毛n眉sha|ngafapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafapnksh毛n眉sha|gongafapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafapsh毛n眉sha|gokingafapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafapsh毛rosha|ngafapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafapnksh毛rosha|gongafapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafapsh毛rosha|gokingafapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafapsh毛musha|ngafapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafapnksh毛musha|gongafapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafapsh毛musha|gokingafapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafapron眉sha|ngafapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafapnkron眉sha|gongafapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafapron眉sha|gokingafapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafaprosh毛sha|ngafaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafapnkrosh毛sha|gongafapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafaprosh毛sha|gokingafaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafapromusha|ngafapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafapnkromusha|gongafapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafapromusha|gokingafapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafapmun眉sha|ngafapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafapnkmun眉sha|gongafapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafapmun眉sha|gokingafapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafapmush毛sha|ngafapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafapnkmush毛sha|gongafapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafapmush毛sha|gokingafapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafapmurosha|ngafapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafapnkmurosha|gongafapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafapmurosha|gokingafapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngafap|ngafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙f忙p|ng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongafap|hongafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙f忙p|hong忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongafap|hohongafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙f忙p|hohong忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngafap|n眉ngafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙f忙p|n眉ng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngafap|n眉n眉ngafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙f忙p|n眉n眉ng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngafap|n茂ngafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙f忙p|n茂ng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngafap|n茂n茂ngafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙f忙p|n茂n茂ng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungafap|lungafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙f忙p|lung忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungafap|lulungafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙f忙p|lulung忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingafap|lingafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙f忙p|ling忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingafap|lilingafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙f忙p|liling忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongafap|kongafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙f忙p|kong忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongafap|kokongafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙f忙p|kokong忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengafap|kengafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙f忙p|keng忙f忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengafap|kekengafap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙f忙p|kekeng忙f忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
